CustomField.description: Formula image field. One red flag = prior plaintiff organization (nepa_plaintiff_risk_flag__c). Two red flags = Tribal Nation plaintiff (nepa_tribal_plaintiff_flag__c) — the category with the 87.5% NEPA litigation win rate in PermitTEC v0.1. Blank = no plaintiff signal. Renders in Public Comments list view so the evaluator sees the dual-flag story before the presenter narrates it.
CustomField.formula: IF(nepa_tribal_plaintiff_flag__c, IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Tribal Plaintiff — 87.5% Win Rate", 16, 16) & IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Tribal", 16, 16), IF(nepa_plaintiff_risk_flag__c, IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Prior Plaintiff Organization", 16, 16), IMAGE("/s.gif", " ", 1, 1) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Red flag = prior plaintiff org. Two red flags = Tribal Nation plaintiff (87.5% NEPA win rate, PermitTEC corpus). Blank = no signal.
CustomField.label: Plaintiff Flag
